titleStmt.title: Telegraph from Frongoch Internment Camp to Sir Robert Chalmers, c 14 July 1916
Letters 1916-1923

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
OHMS
Priority Bala Handed in at 4 p.m Received here at 6.55 p.m. TO: Under Secy Dublin Castle Dn
6299 following 50 Irish prisoners
will be released 8 am—
tomorrow 15th and proceed via
Holyhead and Kingstown 1306C Keane
John Derrydonnell Athenry 1520 Corcoran
Jos 19. Kennedy Villas James
(2)
St Dublin 1373. Cosgrove John
1 Crafton Court Lr Mount
St Dublin 1141 Coughlan Jas
John 21 Upper Bridge St.
Dublin 1407 Cullen John Chris
67 Percy Place Dublin 1527
(3)
Cullen John 37 Wexford St
Dublin 1142 Curran William 3
Vauxhall Ave Off Cork St
Dublin 980 Daniel Henry 6
Lr Gardner St. Dublin 1139 S
BoylanThomas 6 Ashbrook Terrace
(4)
S C Rd Dublin 628B
B Brady Chris 32 Foley
St Dublin 1545 D. Breslin Patrick
111 Foley St Dublin 423
Donnelly Simon 34 Wexford St
Dublin 342 Doyle Henry 104
(5)
St Lotts Rd Dublin 424 Doyle
James Eden Villas Haddington Rd
Dublin 1070 Ducie Patrick 6
Upper Mount Town Kingstown Dublin
807 Dunne Peter 31 Darley
TCE Donore ave A C
(6)
Rd Dn 1221 Ellis John
19 Blessington St on 1072a
Finn Timothy 9 Bresna Cotts
Blackrock Dn 644 Caskin Thos
55 Reuben Ave S C
Rd on 944 Gaynor Arthur
(7)
9 Aughrim Villas on 1142
GeraghtyJohn Anthony 2 Georges
Hill Dn 1433 Gibson Edward
31 Michael Kerr Dn 441
Gill James J 3Landerdale
Tee new Row. Dn 664B
(8)
Gregan James II Fr Georges
St. KIngstown Dn 452 A Hayes
Augustine Dn 526 Higgins James
33 Ellesmere Ave NC
Rd Dn 1475C Holland Daniel

Amiens St Dn 1212 B. Hynes
John 4 Queen St Dn
1160C Kavanagh 23
Up Gloucester St Dn 459

On 15209 Kavanagh Martin 20
Phoenix St Inchicore Dn 461
Kavanagh Michael Jos 5 Pleasant
St Dn 458 Kavanagh Patrick
4 Ross Rd Dn 1434 C
(11)
Kavanagh Peter 4 Ross Rd
Dn 1520-g Kavanagh Thomas
20 Phoenix St Inchicore Dn
1504 Donnelly Michael 113 St. Stephens
Green Dn 452 Donohoe William
24 Lr Stephens St Dn
(12)
1478 Doolan Joseph 6 Brighton
gdns Terenure Dn 1503 Doyle

1141 Doyle Peter 74 Summer
Hill Dn 1478 Doyle Thomas

(13)
Doyle Patrick Ferbane Kings County
(also Coombe Hos) 604 Duke Thos
Patk St Margarets Co Dn 1478
Dunn Denis 22 Brighton Gdns
Terenure Dn 1272 Dunne John
Jos 28 S Cir Rd
(14)

49 Cork St Dn 1272
Ennis Chris 49 Bessboro Ave
N Strand Dn 1432 Ennis
Michael 49 Bessboro Ave N
Strand Dn 1555 Fitzlpatrick andrew
(15)
Chaworth tce Dn
Priswarden Frongoch
